events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario. Front brake job: rotor measured 28.4 mm, min thickness 26.0 mm. So above min. New pads, hardware, shims, guide pins lubed, boots, lug nuts torqued 103 ft-lb star pattern with torque wrench pictured. Road test normal pedal. Need determine acceptable for release. Likely pass. Need fill fields. decision pass. risk low. work_stage tested/inspected. component_conditions none flagged -> empty list. percent_complete maybe 100? Stage tested/inspected but release? percent_complete estimate overall progress 95 or 100. value numeric reading: 28.4 (rotor thickness). sound_source irrelevant empty? Schema string, maybe "". event_time 0, rate 0, order empty list, workable empty list. findings empty. actions empty. rationale brief. references maybe OEM specs. Need ensure valid JSON.
